title: premna annulata
intro: Premna annulata, also known as the Annual Premna or White Premna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Premna annulata is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of digestive problems. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
